name: broader figure
identity: A large, imposing figure acting as a captor, part of a group transporting the player character through the woods.
current_status: Walking to the player's left, narrowing his eyes at the player's attempt to speak, and exchanging terse words with his companion.

volatile_state.current_activity: walking with companion, escorting player character

notes: Companion carries a spear and presses it into the player's back. Group seems to not understand the player's language.
